summary: Submit Liepin managed-tab cleanup from every browser scope without waiting for registry I/O or Chrome close.
rationale: The Liepin provider is a red-zone browser integration. This change preserves primary search and continuation results while moving ownership recording and exact tab close to a bounded background lifecycle; failures fall back to the extension idle alarm and never delay the run.
verification: uv run pytest -q tests/test_opencli_browser_lifecycle.py tests/test_opencli_daemon_automation.py tests/test_opencli_daemon_transport.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_retriever.py
uv run --group dev ruff check src tests experiments tools
uv run --group dev ty check src tests tools
